title: BRIDGING COMMUNITIES - 211info
text: BRIDGING COMMUNITIES BRIDGING COMMUNITIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides parent-to-parent mentoring, training, workshops, events, parent meetings, virtual meeting spaces, support groups, and advocacy. 1017 N Riverside Avenue Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Families with children living with disabilities Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (458) 278-0697 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (458) 278-0697 Call or text Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or text for appointment. Visit website for more information. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Jackson and Josephine Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located in the Valley Immediate Care Administration office at E Main and S Front Streets Services: Parent Support Groups Parent to Parent Networking If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
